Stay Connected

News & Updates

Stories, milestones, and highlights from the Kiwanis Club of Stuart community.

$100,000 Grant from Impact 100 Martin

The Kiwanis Club of Stuart was awarded a $100,000 grant from Impact 100 Martin as a 2026 Grant Recipient -- a tremendous milestone for our club and our community programs.

Saturday with Santa

For over 60 years, we've brought joy to children throughout Martin County. Each year we provide clothing, shoes, Christmas gifts, a free lunch, holiday crafts, free books, fairy hair, and face painting.

Read More

Books for Habitat Families

Our members delivered books and a Little Free Library bookshelf to a Habitat for Humanity family at their new home -- bringing literacy right to the doorstep.

Support Kiwanis Park at Woodlawn

Help us maintain and improve our award-winning 2024 Silver International Kiwanis Signature Project -- where families gather every month.

Learn More

Supporting Local First Responders

The Kiwanis Club of Stuart proudly supports our local first responders who serve alongside us at community events and keep our neighborhoods safe.

Get Involved

Kiwanis Reads Initiative

Our literacy program continues to grow with Celebrity Readers in the Park, Little Free Libraries throughout the community, and thousands of books distributed.

Learn More

Stay in the Loop

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram for the latest updates, event photos, and ways to get involved.

Follow on Facebook Follow on Instagram

Members of the Kiwanis Club of Stuart are dedicated individuals who share a passion for community service and making a difference in the lives of children throughout Martin County.

The Kiwanis Club of Stuart, Florida Foundation, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit corporation. Registration Number: CH5176
